name: lip-sync
description: Syncs video with audio using Kling Lip Sync via ComfyUI Cloud. Takes a video of a character and audio dialogue, outputs video with lip-synced mouth movements.

dynamic_params.1.file: Filename of uploaded video (via POST /api/upload/image with video file)
dynamic_params.2.audio: Filename of uploaded audio (via POST /api/upload/image with audio file)

expected_inputs.video: Upload video via POST /api/upload/image (accepts video files despite endpoint name). Reference by returned filename.
expected_inputs.audio: Upload audio via POST /api/upload/image (accepts audio files). Reference by returned filename.

expected_outputs.video: MP4 video with lip-synced mouth movements matching the audio

notes.limitations: Designed for human faces. Cat/animal face geometry may cause failures. Have fallback plan: overlay audio via ffmpeg if lip sync fails.
notes.upload_note: Both video and audio files are uploaded via the /api/upload/image endpoint despite the name. Use -F 'image=@file.mp4' format.
notes.reliability: Approximately 66% success rate on non-human subjects. Always implement retry + fallback logic.
